name: egov-aluguinsan
description: E-Government Assistance System — Municipality of Aluguinsan, Cebu

scripts.postinstall: npm --prefix backend install --omit=dev && npm --prefix backend run db:generate
scripts.build: npm --prefix frontend install --include=dev && npm --prefix frontend run build && npm --prefix backend run db:generate
scripts.db:migrate: npm --prefix backend exec -- npx prisma migrate deploy
scripts.db:setup: npm --prefix backend exec -- npx prisma migrate deploy && npm --prefix backend run db:seed
